question: Can you find the Manhattan neighborhood where the only NYC elementary school in District 3 that ranked in the top 3 by performance category score in all four consecutive years from 2006-2010. Among the notable museums in that neighborhood, what is the second earliest founding year supported by the museum pages? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
strengths: Task has a multi-hop structure that could be benchmark-worthy once leakage is removed.
concerns: Reasoning text contains literal hop outcomes (not placeholders), which can short-circuit the intended work.
High dataset count makes the tool-call budget borderline (tight) even if execution is efficient.
rationale: The task includes leakage in its reasoning text that reveals intermediate or final results, weakening benchmark integrity. Its dataset fan-out is also borderline for a 30-call budget, increasing brittleness.
suggested_fix: Replace literal hop outcomes / named survivors in reasoning text with <node_X answer>/<hop Y answer> placeholders; keep derivations but avoid spelling out winners.
